# init(screenshot:quality:)

**Initializer**

Creates an attachment containing a representation of the provided screenshot at the requested image quality.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(screenshot: XCUIScreenshot, quality: XCTAttachment.ImageQuality)
```

## Parameters

- **screenshot**: The screenshot to wrap as an attachment.
- **quality**: The quality setting to use when storing the screenshot in the attachment.

## Discussion

Creates an attachment with a [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTAttachment/uniformTypeIdentifier] of `"public.png"` when `quality` is [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTAttachment/ImageQuality/original], and a [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTAttachment/uniformTypeIdentifier] of `"public.jpeg"` when `quality` is [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTAttachment/ImageQuality/medium] or [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTAttachment/ImageQuality/low].

## Creating Attachments from Images and Screenshots

- **init(image:)**: Creates an attachment containing a PNG representation of the provided image.
- **init(image:quality:)**: Creates an attachment containing a representation of the provided image at the requested image quality.
- **init(screenshot:)**: Creates an attachment containing a PNG representation of the provided screenshot.
- **XCUIScreenshot**: A captured image of a screen, app, or UI element state.
- **XCTAttachment.ImageQuality**: Compression quality options for image-based attachments.
